description: Normalized input URL for the site (https:// prepended if missing).
modeling_notes: ID column; drop before modeling.

description: Registrable domain of the site (e.g., example.edu), via tldextract if installed.
modeling_notes: ID column; drop before modeling. Join key for labels.

description: Top-level domain / public suffix of the site (edu, com, ac.uk, ...).
modeling_notes: Encoded as dummy flags in model matrix.

description: UTC timestamp when the crawl of this site began.
modeling_notes: Record alongside labels; sites change over time.

description: Exception message if the site could not be crawled; null on success.
modeling_notes: Converted to crawl_failed flag in model matrix.

description: Number of HTML pages successfully retrieved and parsed (BFS, capped at CONFIG max_pages_per_site).
modeling_notes: Also a size proxy; beware size-fraud confounding.

description: Number of queued URLs skipped because robots.txt disallowed them.
HTTP status code returned by the landing page.
Whether the final landing URL after redirects uses HTTPS.
Total <a> anchor tags across all crawled pages.
modeling_notes: log1p version in model matrix.

description: Total links pointing to the same registered domain (incl. subdomains).
modeling_notes: log1p + per-page versions in model matrix.

description: Total links pointing to other registered domains.
modeling_notes: log1p + per-page versions in model matrix.

description: Sum of visible-text word counts across all crawled pages (scripts/styles stripped).
modeling_notes: log1p version in model matrix.

description: total_words / pages_crawled.
Total tags across all crawled pages.
modeling_notes: log1p version in model matrix.

description: total_images / pages_crawled.
Share of tags with non-empty alt text; accessibility/professionalism proxy.
modeling_notes: Null if site has no images.

description: Total raw HTML bytes across crawled pages.
modeling_notes: log1p version in model matrix.

description: Visible text bytes / raw HTML bytes; low values suggest markup-heavy, content-thin pages.
Number of distinct DOM tag-sequence hashes among crawled pages.
unique_dom_structures / pages_crawled; 1 = every page a distinct template, near 0 = one cloned template.
modeling_notes: Nulled in model matrix when pages_crawled < min_pages_for_ratios.

description: SHA-1 hashes of each page's tag-name sequence (content ignored).
modeling_notes: Input to cross-site similarity; drop before modeling.

description: Share of landing-page 5-word shingles that recur on >=50% of crawled pages; high = repeated boilerplate text.
modeling_notes: Nulled in model matrix for tiny crawls. Counting-based, not NLP.

description: Mean count of elements with inline style= attributes per page; high values suggest page-builder output.
External stylesheets linked on the landing page.
CSS frameworks detected (bootstrap, tailwind, foundation, bulma, materialize).
modeling_notes: Counted as n_css_frameworks in model matrix.

description: Whether any known CSS framework was detected.
modeling_notes: Unmodified framework defaults suggest off-the-shelf templates.

description: Site builders detected (wix, squarespace, weebly, godaddy, wordpress).
modeling_notes: Counted as n_site_builders in model matrix.

description: Whether a consumer site builder was detected, excluding WordPress alone (too common to be a signal).
modeling_notes: Large universities rarely use consumer builders.

description: SHA-1 hashes of up to CONFIG max_css_files_per_site fetched CSS files.
modeling_notes: Input to n_sites_sharing_css_file; drop before modeling.

description: Distinct <meta name=generator> values found across pages (CMS/builder identifiers).
modeling_notes: Counted as n_meta_generators in model matrix.

description: Share of pages with a meta description tag.
Share of pages with any Open Graph (og:) meta tags.
Share of pages declaring a canonical link.
Whether any crawled page declares a favicon.
Whether schema.org CollegeOrUniversity / EducationalOrganization markup (JSON-LD or microdata) was found.
Distinct HTTP Server header values observed.
modeling_notes: Descriptive; not carried into model matrix.

description: Whether any response included a Last-Modified header.
Universal Analytics IDs (UA-xxxx-x) found in page source.
modeling_notes: Fraud networks reuse tracker IDs across sites; feeds n_sites_sharing_tracker_id.

description: Google Analytics 4 measurement IDs (G-xxxx) found in page source.
modeling_notes: Feeds n_sites_sharing_tracker_id.

description: Google Tag Manager container IDs (GTM-xxxx) found in page source.
modeling_notes: Feeds n_sites_sharing_tracker_id.

description: Facebook/Meta pixel IDs found via fbq('init', ...) calls.
modeling_notes: Pixel presence suggests paid-ad recruitment funnels; feeds n_sites_sharing_tracker_id.

description: Links ending in .pdf (catalogs, handbooks, forms); real institutions publish many.
modeling_notes: log1p + per-page versions in model matrix.

description: Outbound links to .gov domains or a whitelist of accreditors/education bodies (ed.gov, CHEA, regional accreditors, NCAA, ...).
modeling_notes: log1p + per-page + share versions in model matrix.

description: Distinct same-domain hostnames observed in internal links (library., admissions., ...); real universities sprawl across subdomains.
Total mailto: links found.
modeling_notes: log1p version in model matrix.

description: Share of mailto addresses on the site's own domain (vs. gmail/other).
modeling_notes: Null if no mailto links.

description: Occurrences of free-email domains (gmail, yahoo, hotmail, ...) in page source.
modeling_notes: log1p version in model matrix.

description: US-format phone numbers matched in visible text.
modeling_notes: log1p + per-page versions in model matrix.

description: Whether a US street-address pattern AND a ZIP code appear in visible text.
Most recent copyright year found in visible text.
modeling_notes: Transformed to copyright_staleness_years.

description: Oldest copyright year found in visible text.
modeling_notes: Used in copyright_year_span.

description: Number of unvisited internal links spot-checked for errors.
modeling_notes: Denominator context for broken_link_rate_sampled.

description: Share of the sampled internal links returning HTTP >=400 or failing.
modeling_notes: Sampled estimate, not a full-site rate.

description: Whether a TLS handshake on port 443 succeeded and a certificate was retrieved.
Certificate issuer organization (e.g., DigiCert vs. Let's Encrypt).
modeling_notes: Descriptive; not carried into model matrix.

description: Whether the certificate subject carries an organizationName (OV/EV cert) vs. a domain-validated (DV) cert.
modeling_notes: Institutions typically hold OV certs; mills use free DV.

description: Days until the TLS certificate expires.
modeling_notes: Short-lived certs (~90 days) usually indicate free DV issuance.

description: Days since WHOIS domain creation date. Requires python-whois.
modeling_notes: Converted to domain_age_years.

description: Whether WHOIS registrant details are privacy-proxied/redacted. Requires python-whois.
modeling_notes: Missingness itself is informative (see *_missing).

description: WHOIS registrant organization name, if disclosed.
modeling_notes: Descriptive; compare against institution name manually.

description: Maximum Jaccard similarity between this site's DOM template hashes and any other site in the crawled list.
modeling_notes: Template-cloning signal; recompute if the URL list changes.

description: Number of other sites in the list sharing at least one identical CSS file (by content hash).
modeling_notes: Fraud-network clustering signal.

description: Number of other sites in the list sharing at least one GA/GA4/GTM/FB-pixel ID.
modeling_notes: Strong fraud-network clustering signal.

description: 1 if the site could not be crawled (crawl_error non-null); failed rows are kept, not dropped.
modeling_notes: Check label confounding: dead sites may correlate with shut-down mills.

description: 1 if pages_crawled reached the per-site cap; distinguishes 'site is small' from 'crawl was truncated'.
1 if TLD is .edu (requires accreditation to register).
modeling_notes: Likely the single strongest prior for US institutions.

description: 1 if TLD ends in gov or us.
1 if TLD is .org.
1 if TLD is .com or .net.
1 if TLD is none of the above categories (country codes, .education, etc.).
domain_age_days / 365.25.
modeling_notes: Median-imputed with a _missing indicator when WHOIS fails.

description: Current year minus max_copyright_year; abandoned or unmaintained sites score high.
max_copyright_year minus min_copyright_year; long spans suggest sustained history.
Count of distinct CSS frameworks detected.
Count of distinct site builders detected.
Count of distinct meta generator values.
Number of CSS files successfully fetched and hashed.
modeling_notes: Also a coverage indicator for the CSS-sharing feature.

description: Total distinct tracker IDs (GA UA + GA4 + GTM + FB pixel).
1 if any tracker ID was found.
1 if a Facebook/Meta pixel was found.
modeling_notes: Ad-funnel recruitment signal.

description: pdf_link_count / pages_crawled (size-normalized).
trusted_outbound_links / pages_crawled (size-normalized).
total_external_links / pages_crawled (size-normalized).
total_internal_links / pages_crawled (size-normalized).
phone_number_hits / pages_crawled (size-normalized).
External links / (external + internal links).
Trusted outbound links / total external links; separates 'links out a lot' from 'links out to accreditors'.
log(1 + total_a_tags); tames heavy-tailed volume counts.
log(1 + total_internal_links).
log(1 + total_external_links).
log(1 + total_words).
log(1 + total_images).
log(1 + total_html_bytes).
log(1 + pdf_link_count).
log(1 + trusted_outbound_links).
log(1 + mailto_count).
log(1 + free_email_hits).
log(1 + phone_number_hits).
PATTERN: for every feature with missing values, a paired indicator equal to 1 where the value was null before median imputation. Exact set of indicator columns depends on the data.
modeling_notes: Keeps missingness (failed WHOIS/SSL, tiny crawls, failed crawls) available as signal instead of hiding it behind imputation.
